character.name: EmpireAssassin
character.prompt:
Fire Emblem GBA style chibi enemy assassin rogue, western fantasy,
3-head-tall super-deformed proportions, total body height equals 3 head heights stacked, body proportionally sized to support the large head NOT undersized, total figure looks balanced like a Fire Emblem GBA chibi sprite,
short body, small hands and feet,
lean swift imperial assassin in european medieval setting,
plain forgettable enemy mook face, cold tired expression, small narrow shadowed eyes, NOT a hero face, NOT large bright sparkling eyes, dull gaze of a low-ranking soldier,
sharp-faced man in his late 20s with dark stubble partially visible,
dark teal green and black light leather armor over dark grey tunic,
classic western thief rogue style, not ninja,
short messy black hair, dark cloth cowl draped behind the neck across the shoulders,
dark cloth scarf wrapped around neck and pulled up over the nose covering lower half of face, eyes and forehead visible,
two short steel daggers, one held in each hand in reverse ice-pick grip,
brass buckles and crossed dark leather belts over chest, leather bracers on both forearms,
no helmet, no shield, no plate armor, no cape,
clean pixel art, vibrant colors, sharp silhouette
